channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: NASA Ends MAVEN Mission After Loss of Contact With Mars Orbiter Following 11 Years of Scientific Operations
item.description: NASA has officially ended efforts to recover the MAVEN (Mars Atmosphere and Volatile Evolution) spacecraft after losing contact with it in December 2025. The spacecraft, which had been operating succe...

item.title: Opinion Column Praises Scott Pelley for Resisting Alleged Political Pressure on CBS News
item.description: In this opinion piece, commentator Thom Hartmann argues that independent journalism is under increasing pressure in the United States and presents veteran journalist Scott Pelley as a prominent exampl...

item.title: Vintage Photographs Celebrate the Beauty and Legacy of Actress Ella Raines
item.description: This article from Vintage Everyday highlights the life, career, and enduring appeal of American actress Ella Raines (1920–1988), one of the notable yet often overlooked stars of Hollywood’s Golden Age...

item.title: Rob Lowe and Melissa Gilbert’s Six-Year Relationship: Love, Fame, and Heartbreak in the 1980s
item.description: The article looks back at the highly publicized relationship between actors Rob Lowe and Melissa Gilbert, who dated on and off from 1981 to 1987. Both were only 17 years old when their romance began. ...

item.title: Practical Tips for Meeting Daily Protein Goals Through Everyday Foods and Meal Prep
item.description: The article discusses strategies for increasing daily protein consumption to support health, weight management, muscle building, and overall wellness. According to health authorities like the NIH, the...

item.title: LEGO Unveils 12,060-Piece Sagrada Familia Set to Commemorate the 100th Anniversary of Gaudí’s Death
item.description: LEGO has announced the LEGO Architecture Sagrada Familia (21065), a massive 12,060-piece model that becomes the largest building set ever released by the company. The launch coincides with the centena...

item.title: Amazon and MGM to Publish Future James Bond Games Following the Success of 007 First Light
item.description: Amazon will take a larger role in the publication of future James Bond video games after the release of 007 First Light. According to Jeff Gattis, General Manager of Gaming at Amazon, the company did ...

item.title: Frequent White Supremacist Candidate Files for Illinois Governor Race After Multiple Unsuccessful Campaigns
item.description: Richard Mayers, a political candidate with a long history of promoting white supremacist and racist views, has filed paperwork to run for governor of Illinois. According to reports cited in the articl...

item.title: Reports Highlight Past Public Controversies and Unusual Behavior by Acting DNI Bill Pulte
item.description: Recent reporting has drawn attention to past controversies involving Bill Pulte, who was selected by President Donald Trump to serve temporarily as Acting Director of National Intelligence while also ...

item.title: Michael Wolff Argues Trump's Political Position Is Weakening Amid Policy and Polling Challenges
item.description: A recent commentary by author and Trump biographer Michael Wolff argues that President Donald Trump has entered a critical phase of his presidency marked by mounting political and policy difficulties....

item.title: Georgia Election Board Member Janice Johnston Resigns Amid Ongoing Election Integrity Debates
item.description: Janice Johnston, a member of the Georgia State Election Board and a prominent supporter of former President Donald Trump's election-related claims, resigned from her position on June 4, 2026. Accordin...

item.title: George Santos Accused of Threatening NPR Reporter Amid Insider Trading Investigation Allegations
item.description: Former U.S. Representative George Santos, who was expelled from Congress and later convicted in federal corruption-related cases, is facing new allegations after reportedly threatening a journalist in...

item.title: David Pakman Criticizes Trump's Oval Office Remarks During Coal Production Announcement
item.description: President Donald Trump held a press conference in the Oval Office on June 4, 2026, to announce a new $700 billion initiative aimed at increasing coal production through the use of the Defense Producti...

item.title: Federal Judge Rules Kennedy Center Must Restore Original Name and Remove Trump's Name by June 12
item.description: A federal judge has ordered the John F. Kennedy Center for the Performing Arts in Washington, D.C., to remove President Donald Trump's name from the institution and restore its original official name ...

item.title: Legal Challenge to Judge Hannah Dugan’s Conviction Could Limit DOJ Use of Obstruction Charges in ICE-Related Cases
item.description: A legal debate is emerging over the conviction of Milwaukee Circuit Court Judge Hannah Dugan, a case that could have broader implications for immigration enforcement and the Department of Justice's ab...

item.title: Gretchen Carlson Says Todd Blanche’s Attorney General Prospects Depend on Ending Controversial Trump Fund
item.description: Former Fox News anchor Gretchen Carlson argued during an appearance on CNN's 'Anderson Cooper 360' that Acting Attorney General Todd Blanche faces significant obstacles if he seeks Senate confirmation...

item.title: Dan Rather Criticizes Bari Weiss for Changes and Firings at '60 Minutes'
item.description: In a pointed Substack essay, veteran journalist Dan Rather sharply criticized CBS News chief Bari Weiss for what he described as destructive changes to the iconic '60 Minutes' program. Rather, a forme...

item.title: The 1915 Simplex Crane Model 5 Tourer and Its Role as a Premier American Luxury Automobile
item.description: The article highlights the 1915 Simplex Crane Model 5 Tourer, one of the most prestigious and technologically advanced American automobiles of the Brass Era. Manufactured by the Simplex Automobile Com...

item.title: Former Trump White House Official Criticizes President's Focus on Reflecting Pool Renovation Amid Economic Concerns
item.description: Former Trump White House deputy press secretary Sarah Matthews criticized President Donald Trump's continued focus on the renovation of the Lincoln Memorial Reflecting Pool during a CNN appearance. Th...

item.title: USDA Secretary Discusses New World Screwworm Threat as Officials Respond to Texas Cattle Case
item.description: Agriculture Secretary Brooke Rollins addressed concerns about the spread of the New World Screwworm during a congressional oversight hearing, describing the parasite as a significant challenge for the...
